member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffEndOfFlowValidationTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for validating DFF data set during the floww.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffEndOfFlowValidationTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes
member.summary: Settings to enable or disable a parameter.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffEndOfFlowValidationTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.DISABLED
member.summary: Enable the parameter.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffEndOfFlowValidationTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.ENABLED
member.summary: Disable the parameter

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffEndOfFlowValidationTestMethod.EnableFailingPortForDefaultValue
member.summary: Gets or sets Enable or disable failing port (port 2) for dff tokens that wasn't updated during Main Flow execution. This will take priorities over failing port (port 0) for token check failure.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffFooterPrintTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible of printing MTL data as a footer into ITUFF.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffFooterPrintTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.DffService.IDffService,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffFooterPrintTestMethod.TokensList
member.summary: Gets or sets the comma-separated token names to be printed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffFooterPrintTestMethod.Modules
member.summary: Gets or sets the comma-separated module names of the tokens to be printed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffFooterPrintTestMethod.DieName
member.summary: Gets or sets die name for printing the DFF data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffFooterPrintTestMethod.DatalogUserBin
member.summary: Gets or sets user bin to be reported in the footer.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffFooterPrintTestMethod.CustomTokensList
member.summary: Gets the custom tokens list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffReadTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffReadTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes
member.summary: Settings to enable individual tokens printout in datalog.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffReadTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.ENABLED
member.summary: Enable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffReadTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.DISABLED
member.summary: Disable.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffReadTestMethod.EnabledModules
member.summary: Gets or sets The IFE object of type IUltDecoderExtensions.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffReadTestMethod.LogIndividualTokens
member.summary: Gets or sets The setting for DFF Tokens to be logged individually in iTuff for ARIES consumption.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeDffReadTestMethod.IsInlineDff
member.summary: Gets or sets InlineDFF flag to enabling or Disabling Inline DFF feature.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod
member.summary: This test method is to get the DFF data. It supports only single token grab with die id, optype support.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes
member.summary: Settings to enable or disable to GetDff setting source.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.ENABLED
member.summary: Enable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.EnabledDisabledModes.DISABLED
member.summary: Disable.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.SearchScope
member.summary: Search within provided scope.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.SearchScope.NONE
member.summary: Do not search using new API.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.SearchScope.UNIT
member.summary: Search from UNIT level tokens.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.SearchScope.ULT
member.summary: Search from ULT level tokens.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.TokenName
member.summary: Gets or sets TokenName for the token we would like to get. Whole Token Example: TokA. By Field Name Example: TokA.F1.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.DieId
member.summary: Gets or sets DieId for the token we would like to pull from. Only single die id is allowed. Value is optional. If left empty, it will grab from the currently set die id.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.OpType
member.summary: Gets or sets Optype on the optype we would like to pull dff from. Only single optype is allowed. Value is optional. If left empty, it use the DFFVars.Read_Optype as the optype.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.Storage
member.summary: Gets or sets for where to keep the data. Accept uservar or sharedstorage. Example On UserVar: UserVarCollection.UserVarName ("." is important). Example On SharedStorage: Any string value as long as it's not delimited by ".".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.Vid
member.summary: Gets or sets for Vid we would like to pull dff data from. Only single vid is allowed. Value is optional. If left empty, it would not find dff based on vid. If defined, user will also need to define die id and optype.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.ForceGetFromUBE
member.summary: Gets or sets ForceGetFromUBE, to decide whether to forcefully get Dff directly from UBE file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeGetDffTestMethod.SearchTokenFromUbeScope
member.summary: Gets or sets SearchTokenFromUbeScope. If enabled, uses new API to search from a set of tokens within a given VID scope. Set of token depends on set param.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.ApiSerialize
member.summary: Class to serialize the API.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.ApiSerialize.MutexLock
member.summary: Mutex lock to serial the api call.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeInlineGetDffTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeInlineGetDffTestMethod.TimeOut
member.summary: Gets or sets the TimeOut (this comment will be used on the pre-header file).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeSetDffTestMethod
member.summary: This test method is to Set Dff value to current Dff Database. It supports set to multiple tokens but only for single die id.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeSetDffTestMethod.TokenName
member.summary: Gets or sets dFF Token Name to be set. Single Token Example: TokA Multiple Token Example: TokA,TokB,TokC Setting a single field Example: TokA.F1 Setting multiple field Example: TokA.F1, TokA.F2.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeSetDffTestMethod.TokenValue
member.summary: Gets or sets dFF Value to set to the token name defined in TokenName parameter. Able to accept USerVar and SharedStorage as a value. Single Value to set Example: 123 Multiple Value to set Example: 123,456 Set using UserVar: UserVarCollection.UserVarName Example: UserVar.VarA Set using sharedStorage: Storage.StorageName Example: Storage.TokA.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Dff.PrimeSetDffTestMethod.DieId
member.summary: Gets or sets die Id for the token to be set to. Only single die id is accepted. If it's empty, it will set the token to the current die id.

member.name: T:PrimeTestMethods.UltData
member.summary: Hold the ULT data.

member.name: M:PrimeTestMethods.UltData.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:PrimeTestMethods.UltData.Lot
member.summary: Gets or sets lot.

member.name: P:PrimeTestMethods.UltData.Wafer
member.summary: Gets or sets wafer.

member.name: P:PrimeTestMethods.UltData.XLoc
member.summary: Gets or sets X location.

member.name: P:PrimeTestMethods.UltData.YLoc
member.summary: Gets or sets Y location.
